---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What would you like Open MMI to do?

## Use case

Why is this useful?

## Area

- [ ] Backend / daemon
- [ ] Vehicle profile
- [ ] Status mapping
- [ ] Action module
- [ ] UI / dashboard
- [ ] Installer / updater
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Safety considerations

Could this affect driver distraction, vehicle status accuracy, or vehicle-critical systems?

## Suggested approach

Describe any ideas for how this could work.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples, CAN notes, or related links.
